TargetSentence: I will go to the park.
Explanation: 使用 will 表達未來將做的事，後接原形動詞 go。

TargetSentence: She is going to read a book.
Explanation: 使用 is going to 表達預定計畫，後接原形動詞 read。

TargetSentence: They won't come to the party.
Explanation: will 的否定為 won't，後接原形動詞。

TargetSentence: He isn't going to buy it.
Explanation: He 搭配 isn't going to，後接原形動詞 buy。
will 移至句首形成疑問句，後接原形動詞。

TargetSentence: Are we going to play soccer?
Explanation: Are 移至句首，搭配 going to 和原形動詞 play。
疑問詞 What 放句首，接著放助動詞 will、主詞 you 與原形動詞 do。
未來時間 next year 放於句尾。
描述未來天氣狀態，使用 will + 原形 be。

TargetSentence: I am going to make dinner.
Explanation: 第一人稱 I 搭配 am going to 表達計畫做晚餐。
will 後接原形動詞 open。

TargetSentence: They are going to buy a car.
Explanation: 預定計畫使用 are going to + 原形動詞。
will 否定 won't 後接原形動詞 be。
主詞 He 搭配 isn't going to + 原形動詞。
Will 移至句首形成疑問句。
Is 移至句首，搭配 going to + 原形動詞。
疑問詞 Where 放句首，接著放 will 和主詞。
未來時間 next week 放句尾。
描述未來的狀態，使用 will + be。

使用 will 表達強烈的信念。
承諾的否定使用 won't。

TargetSentence: They aren't going to watch TV.
Explanation: 主詞 They 搭配 aren't going to。
詢問意願使用 Will you...
will 後接原形動詞 become。
